title: Resin Chiavari Chair with Free Cushion, Premium Steel Frame - Black
features: Use for indoor or outdoor events.
Stack chiavari chairs 7 to 9 chairs high to save floor space.
Ships fully assembled and includes an option for free cushion.
High density resin for exceptionally durable chair

Never loosens or wobbles, even after years of heavy use. The single-piece steel-frame-and-resin construction eliminates the joint failures that cause lesser chiavari chairs to wobble and degrade — your chairs perform consistently from the first rental to the five hundredth.

Stacks 7 to 9 high to maximize storage and move efficiently. Built-in rung pads protect the chair underneath during stacking, so your inventory stays in clean, rentable condition without the surface damage that accumulates with poorly designed stack chairs.

Holds up indoors and out without fading or degrading. The anti-static, UV-treated resin finish resists sun exposure, dust accumulation, and the wear of regular outdoor event use, expanding the range of events you can deploy these chairs for without concern.

Ships fully assembled and ready to use immediately. No setup time, no hardware to manage — every chair arrives ready to go to your next event, which matters when you're processing a large incoming order against an upcoming booking.

Delivers the look of a wood chiavari at a fraction of the maintenance. Resin requires no refinishing, resists moisture and staining, and cleans quickly between events, reducing the ongoing time and cost that traditional wood chiavari chairs demand across a working rental fleet.

specifications.Free Shipping Deal Type: Free Shipping on Tables and Chairs Over $5k, Free Shipping on 50 or more

faq.question: Are Chiavari Chairs fully assembled?
faq.answer: There is no assembly required as our wholesale Wood, Resin and Aluminum Chiavari Chairs are ready to go to your next event as soon as they arrive!

faq.question: What is a resin chiavari chair and how does it differ from a wood chiavari chair?
faq.answer: A resin chiavari chair replicates the classic silhouette of a traditional wood chiavari but is constructed from high-density resin molded around a steel frame rather than assembled from wood components. The practical differences for commercial buyers are significant: resin does not absorb moisture, does not require refinishing, resists cracking and splitting, and maintains its structural integrity longer under the frequency of rental use. Wood chiavari chairs offer a distinct warmth and authenticity but require more maintenance to stay in rental-ready condition over time.

faq.question: Will the joints loosen or the chair start to wobble over time?
faq.answer: Not with this construction. Because the resin is molded directly around the steel frame in a single manufacturing process, there are no separate joints or assembled connections that can work loose. This is the primary structural advantage of this chair over lower-cost alternatives where resin components are attached to a frame after the fact.

faq.question: How many resin chiavari chairs can I stack?
faq.answer: These chairs stack 7 to 9 high. Built-in pads on the bottom rungs protect the chair underneath from scratching and surface damage during stacking, which keeps your inventory in clean condition over time. Compatible chiavari dollies are available on EventStable.com to move stacked chairs efficiently.

faq.question: Are these chairs suitable for outdoor events?
faq.answer: Yes. The resin finish is UV treated to resist fading and surface degradation from sun exposure, and the steel frame is fully encased in resin so it is not exposed to moisture. These chairs are well suited for outdoor ceremonies, patio receptions, and tented events. As with any event chair, storing them indoors when not in use will extend their lifespan.

faq.question: How quickly do these ship and what quantities are available?
faq.answer: Orders received before 2:00 PM ship within 1 to 2 business days from in-stock inventory. Free shipping applies on orders of 50 or more chairs or on combined orders over $5,000. Container quantities are available for large operations — contact EventStable directly for freight and bulk pricing on container orders.
